title: Proclamation No. 372, s. 1939
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 372

RESERVING FOR RAILROAD PURPOSES A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF SAN ANTONIO, MUNICIPALITY OF MUÑOZ, PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for railroad purposes, under the administration of the Manila Railroad Company, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of San Antonio, municipality of Muñoz, Province of Nueva Ecija, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Psd-13504, to wit:

Lot No. 6S3-A. —A parcel of land (lot No. 633-A of the subdivision plan Psd-13504, being a portion of lot No. 633 of the cadastral survey of Muñoz, G. L. R. O. Cadastral Record No. 282), situated in the barrio of San Antonio, municipality of Muñoz, Province of Nueva Ecija. Bounded on the N., by lot No. 412-B-l of plan Psd-13504; on the E., by lot No. 633-B of the subdivision plan; on the S., by lot No. 413-B-l of plan Psd-13504; and on the W., by lot No. 633-C of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 31° 29′ W., 832.78 meters, more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 5 of Muñoz cadastre; thence N. 73° 41′ E., 10.73 m. to point “2;” thence S. 3° 25′ W., 137.80 m. to point “3;” thence S. 67° 25′ W., 11.24 m. to point “4;” thence N. 3° 25′ E., 139.12 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of one thousand three hundred ninety-nine (1,399) square meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “1” to “4,” inclusive, are marked by P. L. S./M. R. concrete monuments, 15 cm. diameter by 60 cm.; bearings true; declination, 0° 42′ E.; date of the original survey, August, 1917-February, 1919; and that of the subdivision survey, March 18 and 19 and April 30, 1937.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-seventh day of January, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-nine, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fourth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Legislative Library, House of Representatives
